'''鈭歯-f-th-l''' ('''kanaftheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jostle|jostle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jostle|jostle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-f-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kanaftheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinaftheloko|thinaftheloko]] || [[word:jinaftheloko|jinaftheloko]] || [[word:shinaftheloko|shinaftheloko]] || [[word:kinaftheloko|kinaftheloko]]
